# Third Party Source

This directory is reserved for third-party source code that is copied, vendored or materially modified for iOS Assist Studio.

No third-party source code has been copied here yet.

Before adding anything to this directory:

- Verify the upstream license.
- Keep the copied scope small and stable.
- Preserve upstream notices when required.
- Record the copied scope in `../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.
- Add tests around the local adapter or copied module.
- Do not add code that bypasses the Dart Runtime state machine.
